title: Implementing Specialization in SQL
description: Shows how to implement entity hierarchy using table inheritance
explanation: In relational databases, specialization is implemented using separate tables for each subclass that reference the superclass table, inheriting common attributes through foreign key relationship.

title: Querying Inherited Data
description: Demonstrates how to query data across superclass and subclasses
code:
-- Get all persons who are students
SELECT p.name, p.address, s.department
FROM Person p
JOIN Student s ON p.person_id = s.person_id;

-- Get all teachers with salary > 50000
SELECT p.name, t.salary
FROM Person p
JOIN Teacher t ON p.person_id = t.person_id
WHERE t.salary > 50000;

-- UNION example for overlapping constraint
-- If person can be both student and teacher
SELECT name, 'Student' AS type FROM Student
UNION
SELECT name, 'Teacher' AS type FROM Teacher;
explanation: Shows how to retrieve data using JOINs between superclass and subclass tables, demonstrating attribute inheritance in queries.
